message:
feat(core): register skip_list module + add 21 proptest properties (ft-283h4.19)

Wire up pub mod skip_list in lib.rs and add property-based tests
covering BTreeMap oracle equivalence, ordering, insert/remove/range
semantics, determinism, stats, and cross-function invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
